name: dev-kit-core
description: Primary orchestrator for the dev.kit environment. Manages health, AI synchronization, and context-aware request translation.

sections.title: Core Primitives
bullets: dev.kit task: Task iteration and context tracking.
dev.kit doctor: Health and security audit.

sections.title: Typical Workflow
bullets: Plan: Resolve context and active task state.
Normalize: Standardize inputs and resolve orchestrator configs.
Process: Translate requests into CLI commands or prompt artifacts.
